_meta.description: Master interaction catalog for The Atomic Family. Every possible action, its timing, positioning, sprite animation, needs effects, skill effects, and display data — all in one file. 202 interactions, 14+ categories, 8 needs, 7+ skills, relationships, inventory.

schema.furnitureId: Matching furniture id from HouseLayout (or _room_<id> / _exterior_<id> for non-furniture)
schema.label: Human-readable short action label shown in UI
schema.duration: { min, max } in GAME MINUTES — AI picks random value in range
schema.timeWindow: { start, end } game-hour range (0-24); null = anytime; wraps midnight if start > end
schema.eligibleRoles: Array of roles that can do this, or null = everyone. Roles: father, mother, son, daughter
schema.category: Grouping tag for weighting, scheduling, and visual effects
schema.priority: Base weight 1-10 (higher = more likely to be chosen by AI)
schema.poseTransform: Sprite scale/offset when performing: { yOffset, scaleX, scaleY } — multiplied by spriteHeight
schema.icon: Emoji icon displayed in the activity bubble above character's head

positioning.snapTo: Redirect to different furniture id (e.g. tv → couch)
positioning.snapToNearest: Random pick from list of furniture ids

schema.needsEffects: Object mapping need name → total change for the interaction (positive = restores, negative = depletes)
schema.skillEffects: Object mapping skill name → XP gained for performing this interaction

energy.label: Energy
energy.description: Physical and mental stamina. Depletes throughout the day, restored by sleeping. Decays faster in the afternoon slump (2-4 PM).

hunger.label: Hunger
hunger.description: How full the character is. Decays steadily, faster around meal times. Restored by eating meals and snacks.

hydration.label: Hydration
hydration.description: How well-hydrated the character is. Decays steadily. Restored by drinking, eating meals, and being near water.

hygiene.label: Hygiene
hygiene.description: Cleanliness. Decays slowly over 24 hours. Restored by showering, bathing, brushing teeth, and washing hands.

bladder.label: Bladder
bladder.description: Bathroom urgency. Decays fastest of all needs (~7 hour cycle). Fully restored by using the toilet.

fun.label: Fun
fun.description: Entertainment and joy. Decays moderately fast. Restored by playing, watching TV, reading, socializing, hobbies.

social.label: Social
social.description: Need for companionship and conversation. Decays slowly. Restored by chatting, group activities, and being together.

comfort.label: Comfort
comfort.description: Physical comfort level. Decays slowly. Restored by sitting, relaxing, sleeping, and soaking in the hot tub.

cooking.label: Cooking
cooking.description: Proficiency in preparing food. Higher levels mean faster cooking and better-quality meals.

handiness.label: Handiness
handiness.description: Ability to fix, build, and maintain things around the house and garage.

fitness.label: Fitness
fitness.description: Physical conditioning. Higher levels reduce energy cost of exercise and improve athletic performance.

creativity.label: Creativity
creativity.description: Artistic and imaginative ability. Improves through drawing, crafts, and creative play.

logic.label: Logic
logic.description: Analytical and problem-solving skills. Improves through studying, reading, and homework.

charisma.label: Charisma
charisma.description: Social grace and communication skill. Improves through conversation and group activities.

gardening.label: Gardening
gardening.description: Green thumb. Improves through tending the garden, yard work, and watering plants.

_schema.description: Relationship values between each pair of family members. Range -100 (enemies) to +100 (best friends). Positive social interactions boost the relationship between the two characters present. Tracked as a symmetric matrix keyed by 'memberA:memberB'.

Each character has an inventory — a list of item objects they are carrying or have access to. Items may be gained through interactions (e.g. picking up garden tools) and consumed or dropped when done.

itemFormat.label: Display name
itemFormat.category: tool | food | book | clothing | toy | misc
itemFormat.consumable: boolean — removed from inventory after use
